data.content: Plan review approved. All 8 acceptance criteria are addressed. Extraction of version-check helpers from doctor.rs into a shared release_version.rs is sound—those helpers are already well-factored at lines ~288-381. Placement of the hook in main.rs pre-dispatch adds minimal code (1-2 lines) with all logic in focused modules. Global state under data_dir(None) is correct for binary-wide checks. Reuse of KNOTS_SKIP_DOCTOR_UPGRADE env var avoids test harness churn across 11 existing test files. Test strategy covers all required scenarios with dependency injection for determinism. No invariants to violate. No revisions needed.
